meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Project Abandonment
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to implement high-converting user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to drive SaaS revenue and retention.
content.answer_block: Project abandonment stems from a lack of immediate user value. By implementing a high-velocity, intent-driven onboarding flow, you bridge the gap between registration and the 'Aha!' moment. Using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can deploy a retention-focused onboarding engine in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is filled with half-finished repositories and abandoned dashboards. You start with a vision, code the core logic, and then hit the wall of 'user friction.' Without a clear path to value, your users churn before they even understand your product, leaving you with a graveyard of features and zero revenue.

But the pivot isn't in your code; it's in your sequence. By treating user onboarding as your primary product feature rather than an afterthought, you force yourself to define the user's success path early. We aren't just building a tutorial; we are engineering a conversion machine that turns cold traffic into daily active users.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that correlates with long-term retention. Map out the minimal steps required to get a user to that specific action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current SaaS stack and suggest a 3-step minimal friction onboarding path that leads the user to the core value proposition of [Insert Goal].
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Analyze current user flow and identify drop-off points in the onboarding sequence.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Build a robust state machine to track onboarding progress, ensuring users never see the same prompt twice and can resume after sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React state machine implementation using XState to track multi-step onboarding progress and persist it to Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file 'src/onboarding/stateMachine.ts' --prompt 'Implement a persistent state machine for user onboarding progress.'

steps.title: Build Contextual UI Components
steps.description: Create high-converting, non-intrusive tooltips and progress bars that guide users through the interface without overwhelming them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable 'OnboardingOverlay' component in Tailwind CSS that highlights specific UI elements based on the current step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --task 'Create a flexible tooltip component that anchors to arbitrary DOM elements.'

steps.title: Implement Event-Driven Triggers
steps.description: Trigger onboarding steps based on user behavior rather than static timers to ensure relevance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom hook 'useOnboardingTrigger' that watches for specific user interactions and triggers the next onboarding step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Refactor onboarding logic to be event-driven based on clicks and form submissions.'

steps.title: Automate Feedback Loops
steps.description: Add a micro-survey at the end of the onboarding flow to capture qualitative data on why users dropped off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a lightweight, single-question feedback modal that triggers only if the user completes the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file 'src/components/FeedbackModal.tsx' --prompt 'Create a post-onboarding feedback loop component.'

pro_tips: Never ask for account setup before providing value; let them use the tool as a guest first.
Use progressive disclosure: only show advanced settings after the user has completed the primary workflow.
Implement 'Empty State' design as a call-to-action; if there is no data, provide a 'Click here to create your first X' button.
Track the time-to-value (TTV) metric; if TTV exceeds 3 minutes, your onboarding is too complex.
A/B test your onboarding copy; small changes to the 'Welcome' header can swing conversion by 15%+.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a cohort analysis to measure drop-off rates, and iterate on the step that shows the highest bounce rate.
content.conversion_block: Stop building features that no one uses. Start engineering a product that guides your users to their own success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
